summary: Iteration 28 testing complete. All 3 new P2 features (Financial Dashboard, Video Analytics, Resource/Field Management) are working correctly. Backend APIs all pass (19/20 tests, 1 skipped). Frontend UI verified with all new tabs and panels accessible and functional.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 added 3 major P2 features: 1) Financial Dashboard (Οικονομικά) - accessible from sidebar under ΔΙΑΧΕΙΡΙΣΗ section. Features: KPI cards (revenue, pending, overdue, expected), monthly revenue chart, records table with filter/search, mark as paid, bulk dues generation. 2) Resource Management (Εγκαταστάσεις) - accessible from sidebar under ΔΙΑΧΕΙΡΙΣΗ section. Features: facilities CRUD, calendar view for bookings, availability checker with time slots, conflict detection for double-booking. 3) Video Analytics (Βίντεο & Ανάλυση) - accessible from team/academy drill-down as Βίντεο tab. Features: video list with YouTube embed support, markers/annotations with timestamps, player tagging. All backend routes in /app/backend/routes/ (financial.py, videos.py, resources.py). Frontend components in /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/ (FinancialDashboard.jsx, VideoAnalyticsPanel.jsx, ResourceManagement.jsx).

financial_dashboard_backend.details: POST /api/admin/financial/records creates record. GET /api/admin/financial/records returns list. PUT /api/admin/financial/records/{id}/pay marks as paid. GET /api/admin/financial/stats returns stats with monthly_revenue, by_category, overdue_records. POST /api/admin/financial/generate-dues creates bulk records.

financial_dashboard_frontend.details: Οικονομικά tab visible in sidebar under ΔΙΑΧΕΙΡΙΣΗ. Overview shows 4 KPI cards (Σύνολο Εσόδων, Εκκρεμή, Ληξιπρόθεσμα, Αναμενόμενα), monthly revenue chart (ΜΗΝΙΑΙΑ ΕΣΟΔΑ 2026), category breakdown (ΑΝΑ ΚΑΤΗΓΟΡΙΑ), overdue list (ΛΗΞΙΠΡΟΘΕΣΜΑ). Tabs: Επισκόπηση, Εγγραφές, Χρεώσεις. Create button: + Νέα εγγραφή.

resource_management_backend.details: POST /api/admin/facilities creates facility. GET /api/admin/facilities returns list. POST /api/admin/bookings creates booking with conflict detection (returns 409 on overlap). GET /api/admin/facilities/{id}/availability returns time slots (07:00-22:00).

resource_management_frontend.details: Εγκαταστάσεις tab visible in sidebar under ΔΙΑΧΕΙΡΙΣΗ. Header: ΓΗΠΕΔΑ & ΕΓΚΑΤΑΣΤΑΣΕΙΣ. Tabs: Εγκαταστάσεις, Ημερολόγιο, Διαθεσιμότητα. Create button: + Νέα Εγκατάσταση. Empty state: Δεν υπάρχουν εγκαταστάσεις.

video_analytics_backend.details: POST /api/admin/videos creates video. GET /api/admin/videos returns list. GET /api/admin/videos/{id} returns detail with markers. POST /api/admin/videos/{id}/markers adds marker. DELETE /api/admin/videos/{id}/markers/{marker_id} removes marker.

video_analytics_frontend.details: Βίντεο tab visible in team drill-down (ΣΥΛΛΟΓΟΣ > Ομάδες > select team). Header: ΒΙΝΤΕΟ & ΑΝΑΛΥΣΗ. Filter dropdown: Όλα. Create button: + Νέο Βίντεο. Empty state: Δεν υπάρχουν βίντεο.

sidebar_integration.details: ΔΙΑΧΕΙΡΙΣΗ section in sidebar contains Οικονομικά and Εγκαταστάσεις sub-items. Both navigate correctly to their respective components.

admin_login.details: Admin login works with credentials: username='Lefteria FC', password='L3ft3r1@FC#2024$Secure!'. Login endpoint: /api/auth/login
